entry.title: Galtier : «Il ne faut pas s’alarmer» - Foot - L1 - Losc

link.title: Galtier : «Il ne faut pas s’alarmer» - Foot - L1 - Losc

entry.content: VIDÉO FOOT - Malgré des matches amicaux ratés, l’entraîneur du LOSC compte sur le mental de compétiteur de ses joueurs pour entamer la saison, samedi (21 heures), contre Rennes, dans un tout autre état d’esprit.
entry.summary: VIDÉO FOOT - Malgré des matches amicaux ratés, l’entraîneur du LOSC compte sur le mental de compétiteur de ses joueurs pour entamer la saison, samedi (21 heures), contre Rennes, dans un tout autre état d’esprit.

entry.title: Steve Bannon exits court after arrest on fraud charges

link.title: Steve Bannon exits court after arrest on fraud charges

entry.content: Steve Bannon, an architect of Donald Trump’s 2016 election victory, left a Manhattan federal court after pleading not guilty on charges of defrauding donors in a scheme to help build the president’s signature wall along the U.S.-Mexico border.
entry.summary: Steve Bannon, an architect of Donald Trump’s 2016 election victory, left a Manhattan federal court after pleading not guilty on charges of defrauding donors in a scheme to help build the president’s signature wall along the U.S.-Mexico border.

entry.title: Dirilis Ertugrul Episode 10 Season 3 (English Subtitles)

link.title: Dirilis Ertugrul Episode 10 Season 3 (English Subtitles)

entry.content:
Dirilis Ertugrul Episode 10 Season 3 (English Subtitles)
On this channel, We Will Upload all Episodes and All Seasons of Resurrection Ertugrul With English Subtitles
‘Ertugrul Ghazi’ is an epic story rooted in the historical events of Anatolia (modern-day Turkey). It is the tale of a daring character with enthralling love and a sense of justice that was strong enough to change the fate of the World. The nomadic Kayi tribe of the Oghuz Turks are on a quest to find a place they can finally call home. Ertugrul leads his people through perseverance against hardship while striving for justice and maintaining the traditions of the land. By battling his enemies with strength and bravery, Ertugrul consequently plants the seed that would lead to the founding of the Ottoman Empire, which spread across three continents and ruled for six centuries.
entry.summary: Dirilis Ertugrul Episode 10 Season 3 (English Subtitles) On this channel, We Will Upload all Episodes and All Seasons of Resurrection Ertugrul With English Subtitles ‘Ertugrul Ghazi’ is an epic story rooted in the historical events of Anatolia (modern-day Turkey). It is the tale of a daring character with enthralling love and a sense of justice that was strong enough to change the fate of the World. The nomadic Kayi tribe of the Oghuz Turks are on a quest to find a place they can finally call home. Ertugrul leads his people through perseverance against hardship while striving for justice and maintaining the traditions of the land. By battling his enemies with strength and bravery, Ertugrul consequently plants the seed that would lead to the founding of the Ottoman Empire, which spread across three continents and ruled for six centuries.

entry.title: Moselle : des photos exposées en pleine nature

link.title: Moselle : des photos exposées en pleine nature

entry.content:
A Faulquemont (Moselle), le festival "Le climat" permet au public de découvrir en pleine nature quelques 150 photos. Un concept qui se développe petit à petit en France.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: A Faulquemont (Moselle), le festival "Le climat" permet au public de découvrir en pleine nature quelques 150 photos. Un concept qui se développe petit à petit en France. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Vendanges : l’afflux des saisonniers inquiète en pleine épidémie

link.title: Vendanges : l’afflux des saisonniers inquiète en pleine épidémie

entry.content: A quelques jours des vendanges, les Châteaux du Bordelais se préparent à accueillir les équipes. Les masques ont été commandés et le travail de ramassage va être adapté aux conditions sanitaires.
entry.summary: A quelques jours des vendanges, les Châteaux du Bordelais se préparent à accueillir les équipes. Les masques ont été commandés et le travail de ramassage va être adapté aux conditions sanitaires.

entry.title: Union Minister Ram Vilas Paswan की तबीयत बिगड़ी, फोर्टिस एस्कॉर्ट अस्पताल में भर्ती वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Union Minister Ram Vilas Paswan की तबीयत बिगड़ी, फोर्टिस एस्कॉर्ट अस्पताल में भर्ती वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Union Minister Ram Vilas Paswan’s health deteriorated, Fortis Escort admitted in hospital. Due to deteriorating health of Union Minister Ram Vilas Paswan, he has been admitted to Fortis Escort Hospital in Delhi. It is reported that 73-year-old Ram Vilas Paswan was having trouble breathing.
केंद्रीय मंत्री रामविलास पासवान की तबीयत बिगड़ने की वजह से उनको दिल्ली के फोर्टिस एस्कॉर्ट अस्पताल में भर्ती कराया गया है. खबर है कि 73 साल के रामविलास पासवान को सांस लेने में दिक्कत हो रही थी.
#RamVilasPaswan #PaswanAdmitted #UnionMinisterRamVilasPaswan
entry.summary: Union Minister Ram Vilas Paswan’s health deteriorated, Fortis Escort admitted in hospital. Due to deteriorating health of Union Minister Ram Vilas Paswan, he has been admitted to Fortis Escort Hospital in Delhi. It is reported that 73-year-old Ram Vilas Paswan was having trouble breathing. केंद्रीय मंत्री रामविलास पासवान की तबीयत बिगड़ने की वजह से उनको दिल्ली के फोर्टिस एस्कॉर्ट अस्पताल में भर्ती कराया गया है. खबर है कि 73 साल के रामविलास पासवान को सांस लेने में दिक्कत हो रही थी. #RamVilasPaswan #PaswanAdmitted #UnionMinisterRamVilasPaswan

entry.title: New SC bench to hear 2009 contempt of court case against Prashant Bhushan Oneindia News

link.title: New SC bench to hear 2009 contempt of court case against Prashant Bhushan Oneindia News

entry.content: The Prashant Bhushan’s case will now be heard on September 10th infront of a new bench. In the lastest developments in the 2009 case involving comments by lawyer and activist Prashant Bhushan, The Supreme Court has today requested Chief Justice SA Bobde to place the case before a new bench. The court has raised a several questions including whether one can go public with allegations of corruption against judges. Justice Arun Mishra observed that he will be retiring on September 2nd and is running short of time. The apex court said that it isn’t a question of punishment but a question of faith in the institution. Prashant Bhushan’s lawyer has argued that any question in reference to corruption by judges and whether alleging it amounts to contempt should be examined by a constitution bench.
entry.summary: The Prashant Bhushan’s case will now be heard on September 10th infront of a new bench. In the lastest developments in the 2009 case involving comments by lawyer and activist Prashant Bhushan, The Supreme Court has today requested Chief Justice SA Bobde to place the case before a new bench. The court has raised a several questions including whether one can go public with allegations of corruption against judges. Justice Arun Mishra observed that he will be retiring on September 2nd and is running short of time. The apex court said that it isn’t a question of punishment but a question of faith in the institution. Prashant Bhushan’s lawyer has argued that any question in reference to corruption by judges and whether alleging it amounts to contempt should be examined by a constitution bench.

entry.title: Vijaysethupathi & Parthiban Book Launch • சென்னையின் பொக்கிஷம்

link.title: Vijaysethupathi & Parthiban Book Launch • சென்னையின் பொக்கிஷம்

entry.content:
#Vijaysethupathi
#Parthiban
சென்னையின் பெருமையை எடுத்துகாட்டடும் வகையில் வெளியான புத்தக விழாவில் கலந்து கொண்ட விஜய் சேதுபதி, பார்த்திபன்
entry.summary: #Vijaysethupathi #Parthiban சென்னையின் பெருமையை எடுத்துகாட்டடும் வகையில் வெளியான புத்தக விழாவில் கலந்து கொண்ட விஜய் சேதுபதி, பார்த்திபன்

entry.title: Pimpinan KKB Ditembak Mati Tim Gabungan TNI-Polri di Papua

link.title: Pimpinan KKB Ditembak Mati Tim Gabungan TNI-Polri di Papua

entry.content:
JAYAPURA, KOMPASTV - Tim gabungan TNI-Polri berhasil menembak mati pimpinan kelompok kriminal bersenjata wilayah Makodap Tiga Timika Hengky Wanmang.
Penembakan terhadap pimpinan kelompok kriminal bersenjata wilayah Makodap Tiga Timika Hengky Wanmang dilakukan saat aparat gabungan TNI-Polri melakukan penggrebekan di markas kali kopi pada Minggu (16/8/2020) pagi sekitar pukul 06.00 WIT.
Dalam penggerebakan yang dilakukan, Pimpinan KKB Hengky Wanmang sempat melakukan perlawanan kepada aparat sehingga dibalas dengan tembakan oleh aparat yang mengakibatkan pelaku tewas di lokasi kejadian.
Dari hasil penggerebekan, tim gabungan TNI-Polri juga berhasil mengamankan barang bukti dua senjata api rakitan, satu pistol air softgun, ratusan butir amunisi, empat magazin, tiga buah bendera bintang kejora dan uang tunai 22 Juta Rupiah serta uang pecahan Dolar Singapura dan Ringgit Malaysia.
Kapolda Papua, Irjen Pol Paulus Waterpauw menyebut Hengky Wanmang merupakan pimpinan KKB yang sering melakukan aksi penembakan di sekitar lokasi tambang PT. Freeport indonesia.
Dia terlibat dalam penembakan WNA asal Australia Drew Nicholas Grant pada tahun 2009 dan terlibat dalam penembakan terhadap WNA asal Selandia Baru Grame Thomas Weal pada maret 2020 dan sejumlah penembakan terhadap aparat TNI-Polri di areal PT. Freeport.
Selain itu, Hengky Wanmang juga terlibat dalam penyanderaan warga Banti pada tahun 2017 serta pembakaran sekolah dan rumah sakit Banti tahun 2018 lalu.
Hengky Wanmang diketahui mulai beraksi di sekitar wilayah tambang Freeport sejak tahun 2009 lalu dan melakukan sejumlah aksi penembakan yang menewaskan warga sipil hingga aparat keamanan.
entry.summary: JAYAPURA, KOMPASTV - Tim gabungan TNI-Polri berhasil menembak mati pimpinan kelompok kriminal bersenjata wilayah Makodap Tiga Timika Hengky Wanmang. Penembakan terhadap pimpinan kelompok kriminal bersenjata wilayah Makodap Tiga Timika Hengky Wanmang dilakukan saat aparat gabungan TNI-Polri melakukan penggrebekan di markas kali kopi pada Minggu (16/8/2020) pagi sekitar pukul 06.00 WIT. Dalam penggerebakan yang dilakukan, Pimpinan KKB Hengky Wanmang sempat melakukan perlawanan kepada aparat sehingga dibalas dengan tembakan oleh aparat yang mengakibatkan pelaku tewas di lokasi kejadian. Dari hasil penggerebekan, tim gabungan TNI-Polri juga berhasil mengamankan barang bukti dua senjata api rakitan, satu pistol air softgun, ratusan butir amunisi, empat magazin, tiga buah bendera bintang kejora dan uang tunai 22 Juta Rupiah serta uang pecahan Dolar Singapura dan Ringgit Malaysia. Kapolda Papua, Irjen Pol Paulus Waterpauw menyebut Hengky Wanmang merupakan pimpinan KKB yang sering melakukan aksi penembakan di sekitar lokasi tambang PT. Freeport indonesia. Dia terlibat dalam penembakan WNA asal Australia Drew Nicholas Grant pada tahun 2009 dan terlibat dalam penembakan terhadap WNA asal Selandia Baru Grame Thomas Weal pada maret 2020 dan sejumlah penembakan terhadap aparat TNI-Polri di areal PT. Freeport. Selain itu, Hengky Wanmang juga terlibat dalam penyanderaan warga Banti pada tahun 2017 serta pembakaran sekolah dan rumah sakit Banti tahun 2018 lalu. Hengky Wanmang diketahui mulai beraksi di sekitar wilayah tambang Freeport sejak tahun 2009 lalu dan melakukan sejumlah aksi penembakan yang menewaskan warga sipil hingga aparat keamanan.

entry.title: Ryan Dean sentenced

link.title: Ryan Dean sentenced

entry.content: Learner driver Ryan Dean, 24, from Ashington, has been sentenced at Newcastle Crown Court after driving at speeds of up to 116mph in a bid to get away from police who tried to pull him over in Cramlington.
entry.summary: Learner driver Ryan Dean, 24, from Ashington, has been sentenced at Newcastle Crown Court after driving at speeds of up to 116mph in a bid to get away from police who tried to pull him over in Cramlington.

entry.title: 10 Championship Players Your Club Should Sign!

link.title: 10 Championship Players Your Club Should Sign!

entry.content: It’s transfer season, and the Premier League clubs that can afford the big deals will look towards the Championship for some talented youngsters they feel can make the step up. These ten players are from clubs up and down the table, although we’ve avoided those who spent the season on loan in the division or have just been promoted. Enjoy!
entry.summary: It’s transfer season, and the Premier League clubs that can afford the big deals will look towards the Championship for some talented youngsters they feel can make the step up. These ten players are from clubs up and down the table, although we’ve avoided those who spent the season on loan in the division or have just been promoted. Enjoy!

entry.title: Krishna River : ప్రకాశం బ్యారేజీకి 4 లక్షల క్యూసెక్కుల వరద, అప్రమత్తంగా ఉండాలని CM Jagan ఆదేశాలు !

link.title: Krishna River : ప్రకాశం బ్యారేజీకి 4 లక్షల క్యూసెక్కుల వరద, అప్రమత్తంగా ఉండాలని CM Jagan ఆదేశాలు !

entry.content:
Andhra pradesh chief minister ys jagan alerts irrigation and revenue department officials ahead of krishna river flood inflows to prakasam barrage this afternoon.
#Krishnariver
#SrisailamDam
#Vijayawada
#GodavariFloods
#RainsInAndhraPradesh
#TelanganaRains
#FloodsOfGodavari
#Rainfall
#flooding
#Telangana
#kinnerasani
#Godavari
#Bhadrachalam
ష్ణానదిలోకి ఇవాళ మధ్యాహ్నానికి భారీగా వరద జలాలు వస్తున్న నేపథ్యంతో తీసుకోవాల్సిన చర్యలపై సీఎం జగన్‌ జలవనరులశాఖ, రెవన్యూ అధికారులతో సమీక్షించారు. కృష్ణా నదిపై ఉన్న ప్రాజెక్టుల నుంచి విడుదల అవుతున్న వరదనీరు, ఎగువ నుంచి వస్తున్న ఇన్‌ఫ్లోస్‌పై సీఎంఓ అధికారులను అడిగి తెలుసుకున్నారు. ఈ మధ్యాహ్నం తర్వాత ప్రకాశం బ్యారేజీలోకి 4 లక్షల క్యూసెక్కుల వరదనీరు వస్తుందని అధికారులు సీఎంకు వివరించారు.
entry.summary: Andhra pradesh chief minister ys jagan alerts irrigation and revenue department officials ahead of krishna river flood inflows to prakasam barrage this afternoon. #Krishnariver #SrisailamDam #Vijayawada #GodavariFloods #RainsInAndhraPradesh #TelanganaRains #FloodsOfGodavari #Rainfall #flooding #Telangana #kinnerasani #Godavari #Bhadrachalam ష్ణానదిలోకి ఇవాళ మధ్యాహ్నానికి భారీగా వరద జలాలు వస్తున్న నేపథ్యంతో తీసుకోవాల్సిన చర్యలపై సీఎం జగన్‌ జలవనరులశాఖ, రెవన్యూ అధికారులతో సమీక్షించారు. కృష్ణా నదిపై ఉన్న ప్రాజెక్టుల నుంచి విడుదల అవుతున్న వరదనీరు, ఎగువ నుంచి వస్తున్న ఇన్‌ఫ్లోస్‌పై సీఎంఓ అధికారులను అడిగి తెలుసుకున్నారు. ఈ మధ్యాహ్నం తర్వాత ప్రకాశం బ్యారేజీలోకి 4 లక్షల క్యూసెక్కుల వరదనీరు వస్తుందని అధికారులు సీఎంకు వివరించారు.

entry.title: Aplicarán mano dura a negocios que violen el toque de queda

link.title: Aplicarán mano dura a negocios que violen el toque de queda

entry.content: El ministro de Interior y Po­licía, Jesús -Chu- Vásquez, advirtió ayer que se actua­rá sin contemplación contra los establecimientos comer­ciales que violen el toque de queda.
entry.summary: El ministro de Interior y Po­licía, Jesús -Chu- Vásquez, advirtió ayer que se actua­rá sin contemplación contra los establecimientos comer­ciales que violen el toque de queda.

entry.title: ENG vs PAK, T20I Series: England announced 14-member squad for the upcoming series Oneindia Sports

link.title: ENG vs PAK, T20I Series: England announced 14-member squad for the upcoming series Oneindia Sports

entry.content:
England, on Tuesday, named their 14-member squad for the upcoming three-match T20I series against Pakistan. The series gets underway on Friday 28 August at Emirates Old Trafford in Manchester. The three-match series will be played behind closed doors, in a bio-secure environment at the Manchester venue.
पाकिस्तान और इंग्लैंड के बीच टेस्ट सीरीज खेली जा रही है, तीन मैचों की टेस्ट सीरीज के बाद तीन मैचों की टी20 सीरीज भी खेली जाएगी, टी 20 सीरीज के लिए इंग्लैंड ने 14 सदस्यीय टीम की घोषणा कर दी है। मंगलवार को तीन मैचों की टी20 सीरीज के लिए इंग्लैंड के चयनकर्ताओं ने 14 खिलाड़ियों के नाम की घोषणा की। इस टीम से टेस्ट सीरीज में पाकिस्तान के खिलाफ खेल रहे खिलाड़ियों को बाहर रखा गया है।
#ENGvsPAK #T20ISeries #EnglandSquad
entry.summary: England, on Tuesday, named their 14-member squad for the upcoming three-match T20I series against Pakistan. The series gets underway on Friday 28 August at Emirates Old Trafford in Manchester. The three-match series will be played behind closed doors, in a bio-secure environment at the Manchester venue. पाकिस्तान और इंग्लैंड के बीच टेस्ट सीरीज खेली जा रही है, तीन मैचों की टेस्ट सीरीज के बाद तीन मैचों की टी20 सीरीज भी खेली जाएगी, टी 20 सीरीज के लिए इंग्लैंड ने 14 सदस्यीय टीम की घोषणा कर दी है। मंगलवार को तीन मैचों की टी20 सीरीज के लिए इंग्लैंड के चयनकर्ताओं ने 14 खिलाड़ियों के नाम की घोषणा की। इस टीम से टेस्ट सीरीज में पाकिस्तान के खिलाफ खेल रहे खिलाड़ियों को बाहर रखा गया है। #ENGvsPAK #T20ISeries #EnglandSquad

entry.title: Justin Townes Earle US songwriter and son of Steve Earle dies aged 38

link.title: Justin Townes Earle US songwriter and son of Steve Earle dies aged 38

entry.content:
Justin Townes Earle, an acclaimed US songwriter and son of Steve Earle, has died, in news confirmed on the artist’s Facebook page on Sunday night.“It is with tremendous sadness that we inform you of the passing of our son, husband, father and friend Justin,” the post read. “So many of you have relied on his music and lyrics over the years and we hope that his music will continue to guide you on your journeys. You will be missed dearly.”Named for his father’s friend and idol Townes Van Zandt, Earle, 38, battled addiction throughout his life. He released eight albums across the course of his career, which saw him honored twice at the Americana Music awards including for his best-known song, Harlem River Blues. Many have paid tribute to the artist on Twitter, with the musician Samantha Crain reflecting on their friendship: “Such a tremendous songwriter. He took me on two tours and always treated me so kindly. He understood struggle, he understood joy I saw him at the peaks and valleys of both through the 13 years I knew him.”His friend and collaborator Jason Isbell said: “Had a lot of good times and made a lot of good music with JTE. So sad for his family tonight.”The writer and cultural critic Hanif Abdurraqib praised Earle as “an incredible writer of narrative – stories that flourished beyond the music they were laid over”. the NPR music critic Ann Powers described his last album, The Saint of Lost Causes, as “a powerful road map of America … we’ve lost someone with real vision.”Earle left behind his wife and young daughter. No cause of death was confirmed.
All data is taken from the source:
Article Link:
#music #news4jax #lincolnnenews #news #nytimes #cnn #newsnow
entry.summary: Justin Townes Earle, an acclaimed US songwriter and son of Steve Earle, has died, in news confirmed on the artist’s Facebook page on Sunday night.“It is with tremendous sadness that we inform you of the passing of our son, husband, father and friend Justin,” the post read. “So many of you have relied on his music and lyrics over the years and we hope that his music will continue to guide you on your journeys. You will be missed dearly.”Named for his father’s friend and idol Townes Van Zandt, Earle, 38, battled addiction throughout his life. He released eight albums across the course of his career, which saw him honored twice at the Americana Music awards including for his best-known song, Harlem River Blues. Many have paid tribute to the artist on Twitter, with the musician Samantha Crain reflecting on their friendship: “Such a tremendous songwriter. He took me on two tours and always treated me so kindly. He understood struggle, he understood joy I saw him at the peaks and valleys of both through the 13 years I knew him.”His friend and collaborator Jason Isbell said: “Had a lot of good times and made a lot of good music with JTE. So sad for his family tonight.”The writer and cultural critic Hanif Abdurraqib praised Earle as “an incredible writer of narrative – stories that flourished beyond the music they were laid over”. the NPR music critic Ann Powers described his last album, The Saint of Lost Causes, as “a powerful road map of America … we’ve lost someone with real vision.”Earle left behind his wife and young daughter. No cause of death was confirmed. All data is taken from the source: Article Link: #music #news4jax #lincolnnenews #news #nytimes #cnn #newsnow

entry.title: Bélarus: à Minsk, des ouvriers en grève rejoignent la contestation

link.title: Bélarus: à Minsk, des ouvriers en grève rejoignent la contestation

entry.content: Les manifestants sont rassemblés devant une usine de véhicules lourds de Minsk, MZKT, suite à l’appel à la grève générale lancé par l’opposition biélorusse contre la réélection du président Alexandre Loukachenko.
entry.summary: Les manifestants sont rassemblés devant une usine de véhicules lourds de Minsk, MZKT, suite à l’appel à la grève générale lancé par l’opposition biélorusse contre la réélection du président Alexandre Loukachenko.

entry.title: Bayraktar AKINCI TİHA 20 bin feet irtifa testini başarıyla tamamladı

link.title: Bayraktar AKINCI TİHA 20 bin feet irtifa testini başarıyla tamamladı

entry.content: Bayraktar AKINCI TİHA’nın ikinci prototipi ikinci uçuş testini de başarıyla tamamladı. Gururlandıran o anları sosyal medya hesabından paylaşan Selçuk Bayraktar, "AKINCI PT-2 (Prototip 2). Abisinden daha hızlı çıktı… 2. Uçuşunu da başarıyla tamamladı. Hem de daha yükseğe tırmandı..Aralarında kardeşce bir rekabet de yok diyemeyiz. Bir maşallahınızı alır…" ifadelerini kullandı.
entry.summary: Bayraktar AKINCI TİHA’nın ikinci prototipi ikinci uçuş testini de başarıyla tamamladı. Gururlandıran o anları sosyal medya hesabından paylaşan Selçuk Bayraktar, "AKINCI PT-2 (Prototip 2). Abisinden daha hızlı çıktı… 2. Uçuşunu da başarıyla tamamladı. Hem de daha yükseğe tırmandı..Aralarında kardeşce bir rekabet de yok diyemeyiz. Bir maşallahınızı alır…" ifadelerini kullandı.

entry.title: Marée noire à l’île Maurice : le cheveu, absorbant d’hydrocarbures

link.title: Marée noire à l’île Maurice : le cheveu, absorbant d’hydrocarbures

entry.content:
Depuis trois semaines, l’île Maurice est victime d’une marée noire provoquée par le naufrage d’un pétrolier japonais. Pour lutter contre cette catastrophe écologique, des coiffeurs récoltent et y envoient les cheveux de leurs clients. 
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Depuis trois semaines, l’île Maurice est victime d’une marée noire provoquée par le naufrage d’un pétrolier japonais. Pour lutter contre cette catastrophe écologique, des coiffeurs récoltent et y envoient les cheveux de leurs clients. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Study: Black Women Surpass White Women In Fending Off Lung Cancer

link.title: Study: Black Women Surpass White Women In Fending Off Lung Cancer

entry.content:
UPI reports a new analysis reveals lung cancer rates are now lower for Black women than White women in the United States.
According to UPI, the JNCI Cancer Spectrum researchers say the study marks a reversal in historic trends.
Blacks have long been considered at higher risk for lung cancer than Whites, due to higher rates of smoking.
But despite being targeted by tobacco companies, Black women have responded favorably to anti-tobacco public health campaigns.
Our study reflects the success of national, state, and local anti-tobacco public health policies and activities in the Black community despite the tobacco companies’ targeted and deceptive marketing strategies. Ahmedin Jemal, Study Co-Author
Lung cancer is the leading cause of cancer death in the United States.
About 80 percent of the roughly 154,000 deaths from lung cancer recorded each year is caused by cigarette smoking.
entry.summary: UPI reports a new analysis reveals lung cancer rates are now lower for Black women than White women in the United States. According to UPI, the JNCI Cancer Spectrum researchers say the study marks a reversal in historic trends. Blacks have long been considered at higher risk for lung cancer than Whites, due to higher rates of smoking. But despite being targeted by tobacco companies, Black women have responded favorably to anti-tobacco public health campaigns. Our study reflects the success of national, state, and local anti-tobacco public health policies and activities in the Black community despite the tobacco companies’ targeted and deceptive marketing strategies. Ahmedin Jemal, Study Co-Author Lung cancer is the leading cause of cancer death in the United States. About 80 percent of the roughly 154,000 deaths from lung cancer recorded each year is caused by cigarette smoking.

entry.title: Kashf Episode 20 HUM TV Drama 25 August 2020

link.title: Kashf Episode 20 HUM TV Drama 25 August 2020

entry.content:
Kashf, Episode 20 - Official HD Video - 25 August 2020
The plot of drama serial ‘Kashf’ revolves around Kashf, the eldest daughter of Imtiaz, an arrogant and indolent person who dreams of becoming rich without making any efforts. Kashf, unlike her sisters and father is a realist but she is haunted by lucid visions and nightmares until she realizes that they are not just dreams but the future of people around her. Word gets out when she saves her friend from marrying a person who has sinister design, and from there the story unfolds into unpredictable turns and twists. To some she is a curse and to others a miracle!
Starring:
Hira Mani, Junaid Khan, Waseem Abbas, Munza Arif, Hajra Khan, Samina Ahmed, Saleem Mairaj, Saji Uddin, Lubna Aslam, Amir Qureshi, Abeena
Directed By: Danish Nawaz
Written By: Imran Nazeer
Produced By: MD Productions
#Kashaf #HiraMani #JunaidKhan #WaseemAbbas #HUMTV #Drama
entry.summary: Kashf, Episode 20 - Official HD Video - 25 August 2020 The plot of drama serial ‘Kashf’ revolves around Kashf, the eldest daughter of Imtiaz, an arrogant and indolent person who dreams of becoming rich without making any efforts. Kashf, unlike her sisters and father is a realist but she is haunted by lucid visions and nightmares until she realizes that they are not just dreams but the future of people around her. Word gets out when she saves her friend from marrying a person who has sinister design, and from there the story unfolds into unpredictable turns and twists. To some she is a curse and to others a miracle! Starring: Hira Mani, Junaid Khan, Waseem Abbas, Munza Arif, Hajra Khan, Samina Ahmed, Saleem Mairaj, Saji Uddin, Lubna Aslam, Amir Qureshi, Abeena Directed By: Danish Nawaz Written By: Imran Nazeer Produced By: MD Productions #Kashaf #HiraMani #JunaidKhan #WaseemAbbas #HUMTV #Drama
